name: typography-h3
visual_summary: The typography-h3 component is a basic heading element that displays text in a font size 3 style. It is often used for headings in articles and stories on the website. A developer would use this component to add hierarchy to content.
generation_prompt:

Style: e.g. minimal

Tags: typography, heading, font size 3
